items.title: OpenAI Release Notes - April 2026 | Releasebot
items.author: releasebot.io
items.snippet: OpenAI has been actively releasing major updates in April 2026. Key announcements include GPT-Rosalind, a life sciences reasoning model optimized for biology, drug discovery, and translational medicine, with a Codex research plugin connecting scientists to 50+ tools and data sources. OpenAI also released a major Codex update expanding the product well beyond coding into computer use, web workflows, image generation, persistent memory, and automations. Additionally, the next evolution of the Agen

items.title: OpenAI Extends the Responses API to Serve as a Foundation for Autonomous Agents - InfoQ
items.author: www.infoq.com
items.snippet: OpenAI has been actively updating its API platform in early 2026. Key model releases include GPT-5.4 mini and GPT-5.4 nano added to the Chat Completions and Responses API, targeting high-volume workloads and cost-efficient use cases. Additionally, models like gpt-4o-search-preview and computer-use-preview have been introduced, alongside GPT-Rosalind — a life sciences reasoning model for biology and drug discovery. The Codex changelog has also seen ongoing updates for developers using the coding-

items.title: OpenAI rolls out tiered access to advanced AI cyber models | Axios
items.author: www.axios.com
items.snippet: As of April 2026, OpenAI's most recent flagship release is GPT-5.4, described as its most capable and efficient frontier model for professional and agentic work. GPT-5.4 introduces native computer-use capabilities (first in a general-purpose OpenAI model), supports up to 1 million tokens of context, and achieves state-of-the-art performance on GDPval — matching or exceeding industry professionals in 83% of comparisons. It is also notably more token-efficient than its predecessor GPT-5.2. The mod
